prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-075DRAM-BUN-144PK-SML-CLR2 Product Type: SCIENTIFIC_SUPPLIES Brand (from catalog): JSP Existing Title: 144pk Hobby Craft Air Tight Glass Storage Vial (3/4 Dram) Description: The .75 Dram Vial is a great addition to any crafter or hobbyist's work area. Each vial is perfect for storing small items like beads, glitter, dust and other essential crafts.

In addition, these vials come in handy for gold prospectors and mineral collectors. They feature a water-tight screw top cap, as well as a durable glass see-through body so you'll be able to identify items easily. These vials will ensure that your craft supplies, gems and other tiny valuables are safe and contained. Search Terms: glass vialair tight vialstoragegold vial lab Features: - Water-tight Plastic Screw Top - Durable Glass Transparent Body - Perfect for Storing Small Items Like Glitter, Dust, Gems, Beads, Small Parts, etc. - Great Gift Idea for Crafters & Hobbyists Alike - Size: .75 Dram === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: JSP 144-pk 3/4 Dram Glass Air Tight Storage Vials

openai.item_name: JSP 144-pk 3/4 Dram Clear Glass Storage Vial

anthropic.title_differentiation: Water-Tight Screw Cap, Durable Glass Body, Beads, Glitter, Gems, Gold Prospecting, Lab And Craft Storage

openai.title_differentiation: Water-Tight Screw Top, Durable Clear Glass Body, Stores Glitter Beads Gems, Great For Crafters And Hobbyists
